positive: Highly detailed vector illustration of a majestic, stylized celestial owl perched on crystalline branches. The composition is central, symmetrical, and designed as a strong silhouette against a deep indigo cosmic background. Incorporate elements of bioluminescence, such as glowing nebula dust, floating geometric stars, and ethereal filigree surrounding the owl and branches. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: midnight blue, deep teal, metallic gold, and emerald green. The style must be clean, sharp, and resemble intricate woodcut linework combined with modern graphic illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimal gradients, maximum graphic impact. No photorealism.
negative: photorealistic, fuzzy, blur, noise, grainy, text, watermark, signature, copyright, logo, complex shadows, gradient mesh, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs
